details.reasoning: Implementation is well-structured and meets most requirements: theme type definitions with all required color properties are correctly defined in the shared package (packages/contracts/src/theme.ts), three built-in themes (t3-light, t3-dark, t3-midnight) are implemented with complete color palettes, ThemeProvider component with useTheme hook properly manages state with local storage persistence and CSS custom property application, ThemeSelector component displays preview swatches correctly, and no build configuration changes or dependencies were added. However, the rubric explicitly requires 'Exported getTheme and listThemes utility functions in the shared package' — these functions are not exported from packages/contracts. The getThemeById function exists only in the web app (apps/web/src/themes.ts), not in the shared package. While THEME_IDS constant is exported which provides theme enumeration, the absence of explicitly named utility functions that the rubric calls for is a notable gap.
